title: Clop ransomware targets Windchill, FlexPLM in data theft attacks
sigma_rule:
title: SENTINEL APEX — Clop ransomware targets Windchill FlexPLM in data theft attacks
id: 0abe6e83-f371-5d56-b4a5-b7b7c524606e
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to Clop ransomware targets Windchill, FlexPLM in data theft attacks (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: HIGH | Class: RANSOMWARE
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/Clop ransomware targets Windchill, FlexPLM in data theft attacks
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/07/24
modified: 2026/07/24
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: process_creation
    product: windows
detection:
    selection_encrypt:
        TargetFilename|endswith:
            - '.locked'
            - '.encrypted'
            - '.crypted'
            - '.enc'
        EventID: 11
    selection_ransomnote:
        TargetFilename|contains:
            - 'README'
            - 'HOW_TO_DECRYPT'
            - 'RECOVER_FILES'
    selection_vssdelete:
        CommandLine|contains:
            - 'vssadmin delete shadows'
            - 'wmic shadowcopy delete'
            - 'bcdedit /set'
    condition: selection_encrypt or selection_ransomnote or selection_vssdelete
falsepositives:
    - Encryption software (VeraCrypt, BitLocker) in use
level: high
kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — Clop ransomware targets Windchill, FlexPLM in data theft attacks — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-07-24T10:31:26Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "Clop ransomware targets Windchill, FlexPLM in data theft attacks", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc
suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX Clop ransomware targets Windchill, FlexPLM in data theft attacks Exploitation Attempt - RANSOMWARE"; flow:established,to_server; content:"vssadmin"; nocase; content:"delete shadows"; nocase; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:9344001; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-07-24, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)
_notice: Detection rules require PRO subscription. Subscribe at intel.cyberdudebivash.com/upgrade.html
